item.title: Transport v2.3.2.46
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.3.2.46
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Tue, 09 Jun 2026 10:58:52 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.4.0]
#159 Fix issue where Lockin_time would generate two data files per run (@pgwijesinghe)
#160 add setRefreshTime API command (used by Lockin_time)
item.dc:creator: Levylab

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]

- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)

item.title: Xeryon-Rotator v1.0.5.11
item.description:
Product: Xeryon-Rotator v1.0.5.11
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 04 Jun 2026 23:43:11 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: instrument framework smo for controlling xeryon rotation stage. initializes communication, monitors rotator status, logs status, and exposed api to for other labview vis to set and get the angle

Release Notes: #8 Instrument Framework 1.15.12 (from ca 1.13)
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Transport v2.3.2.44
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.3.2.44
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 28 May 2026 16:54:14 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.4.0]
#159 Fix issue where Lockin_time would generate two data files per run (@pgwijesinghe)
#160 add setRefreshTime API command (used by Lockin_time)
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Multichannel Lockin v3.4.1.75
item.description:
Product: Multichannel Lockin v3.4.1.75
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 27 May 2026 23:38:22 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: Issues:
#160 Make changes to address lockin going to idle state
build with Instrument 1.15.12 for improved error logging
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Instrument Framework v1.15.12.53
item.description:
Product: Instrument Framework v1.15.12.53
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 27 May 2026 17:18:37 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: An object-oriented framework based on JKI SMOs, developed by the LevyLab at the University of Pittsburgh.

An Instrument developed using this framework will have the access to the following capabilities:

- Framework for communicating with hardware (Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL))
- Periodically polls the instrument for its settings and logs them to a PGSQL database
- Defines an API to allow external programs to control compiled instances of the application and remotely across a network (Either NI's Simple Messaging Library (STM) (deprecated in v1.9) or cross-platform protocol ZMQ (preferred beginning with v1.9))
- Provide a user interface (optional but probably desirable).
- Methods for reading and writing configuration from disk.

Release Notes: [1.15.12]
#198 fix Error Logger dependency declaration
- update Error Logger dependency
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Logger.Error v1.2.2.9
item.description:
Product: Logger.Error v1.2.2.9
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 27 May 2026 17:02:17 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Error datalogger class.

Release Notes: [1.2.2]
#199 recursively search for dependencies to find more processes to monitor errors from
item.dc:creator: LevyLab
